seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: SpaceX is positioning as both model lab and NeoCloud via massive GPU deals ($6.3B with Reflection for open models), recouping investments quickly through compute; unique combo of in-house training + GPU supply planning for variable outcomes.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Open-source 4D strategic memory engine for AI agents enabling temporal reasoning across memory layers with built-in strategic prioritization; addresses underbuilt agent memory architecture.

Real-time Obsidian sync via CouchDB, semantic search with gbrain, episodic memory via mem0 for shared context across multiple agents (Poke, Hermes, OpenCode); practical implementation of persistent multi-agent memory.

Ethereum Foundation dAI team standards (ERC-8183) for AI agents to transact/hire/exchange value onchain, extended with privacy via encrypted outputs, ZK proofs, and px402 for x402 payments; solves public visibility issues in agent workflows.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Layering execution, verification, event-driven orchestration with meta-agents using trace telemetry to rewrite prompts/parameters; discusses challenges like latency, token costs, semantic drift.
near_misses.reason: Conceptual overview of agent orchestration but lacks specific new repo/framework or concrete benchmark/implementation details.

notes: Very limited high-signal technical posts in the past 24 hours from seed experts or broad search; focused on memory architectures and agent standards as the strongest matches. Most results were off-topic or low-engagement.
